title: 10/20/50/100Pcs Custom Logo Air Freshener for Car Bulk,Wholesale Personalized Double-Sided Car Air Fresheners with Photo Text Logo (10Pcs Round)
features: Custom Bulk Air Freshener : Click the button “Customize” , upload your image/LOGO and write down the text you want to be printed on the air freshener. Pictures can be business logos, weddings, graduations, birthdays, pets, etc
Customized photo logo car air fresheners have a variety of fragrances to choose from, such as vanilla, cologne, jasmine, ocean, etc. You can always find what you like

High quality raw materials: Made of pure natural cotton and pulp, extracted from fragrant plants, alcohol free, environmentally friendly and biodegradable. The aroma is warm and rich, effectively removing odors

Long-lasting fragrance:If your customized air freshener is unopened and stored in a cool and dry place, it can be used for two years. After opening, it will have a fragrance that lasts for 40 days in the air, depending on where it hangs. High temperature, sunlight, wind, and humidity can all affect the lifespan of air fresheners.

Bulk Unique Gift : Personalized car air freshener is the souvenir gift for holidays, anniversaries, birthdays, graduation, and the team. Your photo text can be used to create exclusive commemorative air freshener gifts. You can also customize commercial logo to create unique promotional logos for your company team
